block_00: Here is why it may be time to exit a deal
block_01: Do you carry on with a trade as long as the trend is moving up? How long do you keep a losing deal open, hoping for a trend reversal? Have you set the Stop-Loss and Take-Profit levels for your trades? If you do not have answers to these questions, your trading results might be at risk.
block_02: Some experts suggest planning an exit strategy before entering any deal. It is a set of rules that may protect you from your own greed and psychological biases endangering trading results. These rules might differ depending on your goals and trading methods.
block_03: This article offers ideas on how to choose the right time to exit a trade. It also goes over useful technical tools, such as Stop-Loss and Take-Profit, that may help you automatically close the losing deals and protect your capital.
